title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 660.340 - Cost of record search
text:
660.340.  Cost of record search. — The department shall reimburse any entity for the cost of computer time expended by the entity in making a search of its records as a result of a request made pursuant to sections 660.325 to 660.355, at a reasonable rate.  If the request asks for records of any deposits and withdrawals during the past five years, and the entity cannot obtain such information by automated search of its records, the department shall reimburse the entity at the rate of six dollars per man hour expended.
(L. 1983 S.B. 285 § 5)
